noTarget.title: No project selected
noTarget.body: Vivicy needs a project whose .vivicy/canonical/ holds the canonical spec. Open Vivi (bottom-left) to set one up.

noMap.title: No issues extracted yet
noMap.body: Extract reads the frozen canonical spec in .vivicy/canonical/ and authors the full plan — requirements, vertical issues, and the architecture map. Import docs first if the canonical is still empty, or run Extract to generate the graph.

emptyMap.title: Architecture map is empty
emptyMap.body: A map was generated but it has no nodes yet. Import docs that describe at least one component, then re-run Extract.

node.activeWorkTitle: The development agent is working on this graph item

editToolbar.editTitle: Edit layout: drag nodes, cluster titles, and edge labels
editToolbar.saveFailedUnknownNode: Cannot save layout for unknown node {id}
editToolbar.saveFailedUnknownEdge: Cannot save label layout for unknown edge {id}

edgeLabel.editableTitle: Drag to move label · double-click to reset
